description: Tools for browsing, checking availability, and booking verified local tour guides in Cambodia. The Vibe Booking AI agent uses these to help users find a guide who speaks their language and matches their interests.

tools.name: list_guides
tools.description: Browse and filter verified tour guides in Cambodia. Use when the user wants a local guide, needs someone who speaks a specific language, or has a specialty preference. Returns paginated list of guide summaries.

language.description: Filter by spoken language (value must match SupportedLanguage enum in DB)

tools.returns: Paginated list of guides with id, name, languages, specialities, location, pricePerDayUsd, isVerified, ratingAverage

tools.name: get_guide_detail
tools.description: Get the full profile of a specific tour guide including bio, experience, certifications, and photo gallery. Use when the user wants to learn more about a particular guide.
tools.returns: Full guide profile with bio, experienceYears, certifications, galleryImageUrls, status (ACTIVE | INACTIVE | SUSPENDED)

tools.name: check_guide_availability
tools.description: Check if a specific guide is available for the requested date range. Always call this before creating a guide booking. Date range max 90 days.

from.description: Start date of the desired booking (YYYY-MM-DD)

to.description: End date of the desired booking (YYYY-MM-DD)

tools.name: create_guide_booking
tools.description: Create a tour guide booking with a 15-minute hold. Use after confirming availability and user consent. The booking enters HOLD status until payment is completed. Requires user authentication. Supports Idempotency-Key header.

Idempotency-Key.description: Optional unique key to prevent duplicate bookings on retry

linkedTripBookingId.description: Optional: link to an existing trip booking

tools.returns: BookingDetail with id, reference, status (HOLD), totalUsd, expiresAt (15 min), items[]
